briefdescription.para: This is main code of Xilinx HDMI Receiver Subsystem for HDCP Functionality.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmirxss.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MMO 19/12/16 Move HDCP Code from xv_hdmirxss.c to xv_hdmirxss_hdcp.c 3.2 MH 04/07/17 Fixed issue to prevent HDCP protocol switching when only one protocol is in the design. MH 09/08/17 Added function XV_HdmiRxSs_HdcpSetCapability
